item.title: Solutions Architect: Serverless
item.description: Serverless is a new paradigm in which the developers don’t have to manage servers anymore… They just deploy code…

item.title: Cloud Integrations & Messaging
item.description: Cloud Integrations / decoupling. This section is about multiple applications communicating with each other. SNS, SQS, MQ….
